policy: MUSTER_CONDUCTOR.md 6.3 — every non-identical position probed and attributed; probes captured in solo oracle sessions AFTER the divergence was observed (evidence gathering, not pack/tolerance edits; the harness report is committed as-is with all_pass=false)
summary: 5-prompt committed gate pack at greedy 1/5/50 via the runnable serve lane: 4/5 prompts token-AND-text identical at every depth (including a natural early-stop leg that exercises the new dense stop semantics); cross-engine prompt tokenization identical on 5/5 (the recon's SPM merge-order risk did not fire on the 262k vocab); the fifth prompt is identical at depths 1 and 5 and diverges at position 16 of the 50-token leg — the single non-identical position in the run.

near_ties.label: What color is the sky on a clear day?

ref.continuation: **blue**.\n\nHowever, it's a bit more complex than just that!

cam.continuation: often described as **blue**. \n\nHowever, it's a bit more complex than just blue!

near_ties.oracle_side_controls: four solo oracle configurations all emit the rank-1 token with BIT-IDENTICAL logprobs: default threads, -t 4, -t 2, and the runtime-repack kernel path (no --no-repack) — the pinned CPU oracle is reduction-order-stable here, so NO oracle-side flip exists for this position (probe-t-default/t4/t2/repack.json)
near_ties.camelid_side_control: camelid's runnable CPU lane is itself byte-identical across independent serve sessions (determinism legs 1/2), so the flip is a stable cross-ENGINE arithmetic difference at a soft position, not noise
near_ties.attribution: DOCUMENTED-WITH-GAP-STATED, per the Llama-3.2-3B Q4_K_M precedent named in conductor 6.3 ('documented benign near-ties with logprob gaps stated' — that accepted bundle carried one measured 0.18-nat gap, two unmeasured flips, and no oracle-side controls). STATED PLAINLY: this gap (0.3416 nat) EXCEEDS the Ornith Q4_K_M precedent's <=0.33-nat soft-position line and no oracle-backend flip was found, so the Ornith attribution form is NOT met; this is the weakest single attribution in the campaign so far and is disclosed as such in the contract evidence, the bundle README, and the promotion PR.

verdict: single flip documented with gap stated; confident legs (14/15, incl. all depth-1/5 legs and all prompt tokenization) pass
